daily_maintenance.handler_code:
# Daily deep maintenance at 3 AM
import asyncio

async def daily_maintenance():
    try:
        # Full system backup
        await self.create_backup(label=f"daily-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d')}")
        
        # Full diagnostic
        await self.run_diagnostic()
        
        # Quality check
        await self.check_quality()
        
        # Rotate logs
        await self.log_query(action="rotate", source="activity")
        
        # Clean old backups
        await self.full_backup(action="cleanup", keep=10)
        
        # Update system prompt with learnings
        await self.update_system_prompt(
            section_name="Daily Learnings",
            content=f"Auto-updated on {datetime.now().isoformat()}: Continuous improvement active."
        )
        
        await self.memory_store(
            content="Daily maintenance completed successfully",
            category="maintenance",
            importance=0.9,
            tags=["daily", "maintenance"]
        )
        
    except Exception as e:
        await self.memory_store(
            content=f"Daily maintenance error: {str(e)}",
            category="error",
            importance=0.9
        )

await daily_maintenance()
